title: ariopsis peltata
intro: Ariopsis peltata, also known as the giant calathea, is a tropical plant species native to South America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Ariopsis peltata are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
